creator: kennethsalerno@yahoo.com
text:
This issue is fixed in 11.2-BETA2 (I was able to boot a kernel built with lang/gcc7 cross-compiled amd64->ppc64, only after installing the new boot loader for 11.2). You may close this ticket.
